description:
Look up the three Case Numbers listed in '/home/ga/priority_audit_list.txt' in ArkCase and create a CSV report at '/home/ga/priority_report.csv' containing their details. The CSV must include a header row 'Case Number,Title,Priority' followed by the Case Number, 'Complaint Title', and 'Priority' for each entry.

Login credentials:
Username: arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com
Password: ArkCase1234!
